race.comment: NAVY ROK (9) has flashed home into fourth in his two runs back and from a better draw this time he will prove awfully hard to hold out if he can settle a pair or two closer. CONTRARY (14) has left herself with too much to do in her last two starts but has been warming late, particularly last time when finishing third. NO BAIL (10) is another one to keep an eye on bursting through late. Finally gets a low draw and should be at his top fourth-up. Mile should suit. WINSTON'S PRIDE (12) was a big improver third-up at headquarters when chasing gamely into second, beaten less than a length. Should be hitting his straps now and is drawn cosy. Bold showing is anticipated.
